title: Kitchen Scale, 11 lb Digital Food Scales with Batteries, 5 Units with Tare Function, Touch Button, Backlit LCD Display
features: Ulixii food scale with 4 new high precision sensors weighs up to 11 lb (5 kg) graduation 0.05oz/1g, minimum weight recommendation 3g-5g.
Lightweight but sturdy construction and 7” x 5” compact size make the digital scale easy to store in small space.
Powered by 2 x AAA batteries (included),our worry-free 2-year warranty, and friendly customer service.
Simple to use with just two buttons, fast tare and easy units conversion between g,oz, ml and Ib:oz measurement; backlight LCD display for visible readings.
The kitchen scale has sleek stainless steel top makes wipe cleaning a breeze, do not worry any fingerprint, spills and food residue, easier to be keep clean and maintain.
description: Product Description Ulixii Food Scale ﻿ For the cooks, the creators, the bakers, and the brewers, for the doers and the dabblers, the masters and the misfits, for the tasters and the testers, from meal planners to party preppers, for all those who don't cook to live, but live to cook, this is for you. Because Ulixii is Made for Makers. Measure Smarter low battery indication, auto-off Save yourself time and energy in the kitchen with automated efficiency. The video showcases the product in use.
